# Budget — minimal-storage-only fixture

Single storage account (Standard_LRS) in `swedencentral`.

- **Monthly budget (USD)**: 50
- **Forecast alerts**: 80%, 100%, 120%
- **Anomaly detection**: enabled
- **Owner contact**: `platform-team@example.local`

Used by the Wave 0 baseline harness and Step 4 contract emission tests.
No real production values — all IDs and emails are placeholders.
